'''Norsam Corp.''' was a company the supplied weapons and munitions systems to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], they were on the list of legitimate targets for [[Rebel privateer]]s.<ref name="RP">{{JournalCite|2|Rebel Privateers!}}</ref> They made the [[DR-X55]] [[lift-mine]].<ref name="CRFG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
